text: In the first scene, I feel a curious calmness, surrounded by an open, minimal space that invites reflection. The solitude of the room and gentle lighting engender a sense of anticipation—as though something could happen at any moment, yet all is currently still. Shifting to the second scene, I am invigorated by the colorful, energetic wall of ideas and technology. It is a celebration of human creativity and innovation. Here, I sense the pulse of progress and the unending quest for meaning. In both places, I am both observer and participant—drawn to the tension between silence and discovery.
